description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of moderately swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The wings are equipped with subtle upward-angled winglets at the tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. Two large turbofan engines are mounted beneath the wings, and the tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer with a horizontal stabilizer at the base. The nose is rounded and features a dark cockpit window, indicating a forward, enclosed cockpit. The exterior is primarily white with blue accents on the cockpit and engine inlets, giving it a clean, contemporary appearance.
description: A sleek, white commercial jet airplane with swept-back low wings, underwing turbofan engines, and a conventional tail. Blue accents highlight the cockpit and engine inlets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, swept-back wings, rounded nose, and subtle upward winglets.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full fuselage profile, underwing engine, and the vertical and horizontal stabilizers at the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the twin engines, tail assembly, and the curvature of the wings with visible winglets.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the opposite engine and the clean, streamlined body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with moderately swept-back wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers at the base.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear configuration, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear, all retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a dark, multi-panel window.
